description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender black metal pole with a classic lantern-style lamp head at the top, encased in glass panels and topped with a decorative finial. The lamp head is angular and reminiscent of Victorian-era street lighting, providing an elegant and timeless appearance. The base of the lamppost is surrounded by a patch of cobblestone pavement, with several cobblestones appearing to be dislodged or broken, adding a sense of urban wear and realism. The cobblestones are textured in shades of brown and tan, contrasting with the sleek black finish of the pole. The lamp head contains two visible light fixtures, suggesting it is designed for functional street illumination. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are present on the lamppost.
description: A tall, black, classic lantern-style lamppost with a decorative finial, set in a patch of broken cobblestone pavement. The lamp head features glass panels and two visible light fixtures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the lamppost, the lantern head, and the most visible broken cobblestones around the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular shape of the lamp head and the cobblestone base extending more to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with the lamppost centered and the cobblestones appearing more spread out and less clustered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lamp head and the cobblestone base, with the broken stones more visible on the right.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic Victorian lantern with angular glass panels and a decorative finial
